name: sat_AACAC_chrY
description: Drosophila simple satellite block: AACAC satellite (Bonaccorsi 1990) on chrY — distinctive heterochromatin marker dispersed across Y.. Drosophila satellites are chromosome-position-specific and used as cytogenetic markers (Lohe 1993). They form most of the ~30% of the genome that is heterochromatin.
